Publications

[ICRA'22] AutoPlace: Robust Place Recognition with Single-Chip Automotive Radar
Cai, Kaiwen, Wang, Bing, and Lu, Chris Xiaoxuan in 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation.




[SenSys'21] Can Image Style Transfer Save Automotive Radar?
Deng, Jianning, Kaiwen Cai, and Chris Xiaoxuan Lu In Proceedings of the 19th ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems. 2021.
